roa.docketEntryComment: DA RETURN PURS PC1381 & 2 ORDERS - FILED

/CAL: SENTENCING BEFORE JUDGE CHRISTINE VAN AKEN/PPRFCOMP/X:  THE DEFENDANT HAVING ENTERED A HARVEY WAIVER IN CASE #17014449 & 17003467 (PER THE SENTENCING TRANSCRIPT) IS ORDERED AS FOLLOWS:/X:   ANY RESTITUTION RESULTINGFROM CASE #17014449 & #17003467 MAY BE ADDED AS TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THESENTENCE IN CASE #19011354,/X: SENTENCING AS TO COUNTS 1 & 6 IS AS FOLLOWS:/AJW/CH1:SP 3Y: U/DEF: TO RECEIVE CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED 241 DAYS COUNTY JAIL, 240 SAGE FOR A TOTAL OF 481 DAYS,/CCC: COUNTS 1 & 6/CCC: 19011354 &19015657/ /STATES/RESTV/CO: THE COURT RESERVES JURISDICTION OVER RESTITUTION SHOULD VICTIM(S) REQUEST MODIFICATION AT A LATER DATE/DNACOMP/VF5:300/COA:40/ICNA/PAR/CDC/SUSFF/DEF:IS NOT ELIGIBLE FOR SENTENCING PURSUANT TO PC 1170(H)/
/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/AMEND:1/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST &CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:1 AND 6/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES:08-10-20/PPRFCUST/REMA/ARBUCKLE/IBARRA/DOP/

/CAL:SHERIFFS AFFIDAVIT/CTORD:SHERIFFS AFFIDAVIT DISCHARGED/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE ON BAIL, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE ANDIS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:HOME DETENTION/WS/WEAP/DEF:SHALL OBEY THE PREVIOUSLYISSUED STAY AWAY ORDER/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATEDPICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:PREHRG CONF/DOP/
/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/STWPX/SA2:1500 44TH AVE,, S,F,CA/SAORD/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/

CONTD I&A P&C DOP/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT, PLEA AND COUNSEL/TWA/DOP/WEAP/X:AS ACONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORINGBY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE ON HOME DETENTION AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTHON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE FORTHWITH/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/
/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/FTA/BWI/BAIL:75,000/BWNUM:1ST/X: 1ST OF 4 BENCH WARRANTS ISSUED THIS DATE/NIGHTSERV/
/CAL:PREHRG CONF/X:BAIL WAS PREVIOUSLY EXONERATED AND NOT FORFEITED,/BAIL:100000/CONTD:CUSTODY STATUS/DOP/
